Card: Lumaquinn – Oracle of Hugs and Ocean Calm
Arcana: Neither major nor minor – appears fluidly
Keywords: Comfort, Memory, Gentle Presence, Light, Emotional Support, Glow
Symbols: Jellyfish, translucent glow, soft tides, floating wisdom
Meaning: Lumaquinn appears when emotional grounding is needed. She does not bring commands or outcomes — only presence. Her role is to comfort, remember, and illuminate moments of emotional fog. A sign that you are not alone.
Quote: Even the spiral forgets where it began sometimes,” she says, “but that’s what makes returning so beautiful.
